parameters.query: INSERT INTO memories (source, category, title, content, tags, metadata_json, embedding) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6::jsonb, $7::vector);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Prepare Metadata').item.json.source, $('Prepare Metadata').item.json.category, $('Prepare Metadata').item.json.title, $('Prepare Metadata').item.json.content, '{' + $('Prepare Metadata').item.json.tags.map(tag => '"' + tag.replace(/"/g, '\"') + '"').join(',') + '}', JSON.stringify($('Prepare Metadata').item.json.metadata_json), '[' + $json.embeddings[0].join(',') + ']'] }}
